sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51625" key="kaddaimone/steros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καδδαιμονέστερος</orth>, <sense id="n51625.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κακοδ-</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> Demiańczuk.</sense> </entryFree>
